---
title: "Conference Nametags"
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    papersize: us-letter   # overridden per-page by nametag.typ
    margin:
      x: 0pt
      y: 0pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: read-attendees
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

# CSV schema: First, Last, Affil1 (department/title), Affil2 (institution)
attendees <- read_csv("attendees.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), \(x) replace_na(x, ""))) |>
  mutate(
    name           = str_trim(paste(First, Last)),
    affiliation    = Affil2,    # institution = primary line
    subaffiliation = Affil1     # department / title = secondary line
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: emit-typst
#| results: asis

# Escape Typst-special characters so names with quotes/backslashes don't break the build
ty_escape <- function(x) {
  x |>
    str_replace_all(fixed("\\"), "\\\\") |>
    str_replace_all(fixed("\""), "\\\"")
}

cat('```{=typst}\n')
cat('#import "nametag.typ": nametag\n')
cat('```\n\n')

for (i in seq_len(nrow(attendees))) {
  a <- attendees[i, ]
  cat('```{=typst}\n')
  cat(sprintf(
    '#nametag(\n  name: "%s",\n  affiliation: "%s",\n  subaffiliation: "%s",\n)\n',
    ty_escape(a$name),
    ty_escape(a$affiliation),
    ty_escape(a$subaffiliation)
  ))
  cat('```\n\n')
}
```
